type_of_issue: Clogged and inefficient stormwater drainage, primarily caused by solid waste accumulation and poor maintenance.
what_is_the_issue: The locality suffers from frequent waterlogging due to blocked drainage lines, leading to stagnant water accumulation. Poor waste disposal practices and irregular cleaning of drains aggravate the problem, especially during the monsoon season.
type_of_volunteer_need: Sanitation workers, Cleanup volunteers, Awareness volunteers, Coordination volunteers
